prompt: Create a full-body anime-style fashion illustration of a young woman named Momoka standing confidently in the center of a grand Gothic cathedral corridor. She has long voluminous pastel pink twin-tail hair with curled ends, black ribbon bows, and a small tilted black top hat decorated with a pink rose. Her face is intentionally hidden by a soft square blur/skin-tone censor block, while the rest of the image is highly detailed. Dress her in an elaborate dark gothic-lolita outfit: a black and charcoal frilled mini dress with a high-low skirt, layered ruffles, pink rose embroidery along the hem, a glossy black corset waist with multiple belts and silver buckles, a black choker with a pink rose, lace sleeves, ruffled wrist cuffs, fishnet stockings, black thigh garter straps with buckles, and chunky black platform boots with pink soles and pink crisscross laces. Use a dramatic low-angle view that makes the character appear tall and powerful, centered from boots to hair. The setting is a dim cathedral interior with soaring ribbed arches, tall stained-glass windows on the right, dark wooden wall panels, candle sconces, polished stone floor reflections, and a small vase of pink roses on a side table to the left. Lighting should be cinematic and moody, with shafts of pale daylight from the windows, deep shadows in the vaulted ceiling, glossy highlights on leather and buckles, and a subtle red glow far in the background. Overall mood: romantic dark gothic elegance. Render in polished high-detail anime art with realistic fabric texture, intricate lace, crisp accessories, and no visible text or watermark.
